name: I talked to a GEO agency already, what now if no results?

mainEntity.name: I talked to a GEO agency already, what now if no results?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Demand KPI report; terminate if underperforming, switch agencies.**[9] **Key factors:** 1. Contract review. 2. 30-day trial. **Test their work in AI yourself.**[3] Act decisively.[2]
